title: Mock Exam E
description: A 22 task RHCSA style mock exam focused on offline repositories, Apache document roots, ACLs, NFS, and storage maintenance.

tasks:
Configure networking on clientvm with the following settings:

IP ADDRESS: 192.168.122.37
NETMASK: 255.255.255.0
GATEWAY: 192.168.122.1
DNS SERVER: 192.168.122.3
HOSTNAME: clientvm.exam-e.lab
Add a persistent hosts entry so registry.exam-e.lab resolves to 192.168.122.3.
Configure a repository file on clientvm with BaseOS and AppStream served from servervm, enabled, and with gpgcheck disabled.
Configure the same repository file on servervm.

Configure Apache on clientvm so it serves /srv/harbor-web on TCP port 8181.

Requirements:
- Start automatically at boot.
- Open the port permanently in the firewall.
- Apply the SELinux changes needed for the custom document root and port.
Create group harborops and create users lena and ivor with harborops as a supplementary group at creation time. Set the password of both users to cinder9.
Set password aging for ivor to maximum 30 days, minimum 2 days, and warning 7 days.
Create /srv/harbor-drop owned by root:harborops with mode 2770 and a default ACL that grants harborops rwx on new files and directories.
Create user harborremote without a home directory, with shell /sbin/nologin, and set its password to cinder9.
Configure pwquality so passwords require a minimum length of 12 and at least 3 character classes.
Queue a one-time at job as user ivor that appends the message "exam-e tick" to /root/exam-e-at.log in 2 minutes.
Persistently mount servervm:/exports/harborhome on /mnt/harborhome using /etc/fstab.
On servervm, enable persistent systemd journal storage and restart systemd-journald.
Append a login message for ivor to ~/.bash_profile that prints "exam-e access" when ivor logs in.
Create user maple551 with UID 4551, no home directory, shell /sbin/nologin, and password cinder9.
Find all files under /opt/exam-e/find that are owned by scoutte and were modified within the last 24 hours. Copy them to /root/scoutte-files while preserving the source directory structure.
Extract lines containing beacon from /usr/share/dict/words into /root/beacon-lines.
Create /root/var-tmp-harbor.tar.bz2 containing /var/tmp.
Create executable script /usr/local/bin/harbor-check that writes the active state of each service listed in /usr/local/share/exam-e/services.lst to /root/harbor-services.txt.

On /dev/sdb, create a 640 MiB swap partition.

Requirements:
- Enable it immediately.
- Configure it persistently.
Resize /dev/reviewvge/reviewe so the final size is 360 MiB without losing the existing filesystem data.
Apply the recommended tuned profile and leave it active.
solution_commands: nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.37/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
echo "echo exam-e tick >> /root/exam-e-at.log" | at now + 2 minutes
parted -s /dev/sdb -- mklabel gpt mkpart primary linux-swap 1MiB 641MiB
checks: hostnamectl --static | grep -qx 'clientvm.exam-e.lab' && grep -Fqx '192.168.122.3 registry.exam-e.lab' /etc/hosts && curl -fsS http://servervm/repo/BaseOS/repodata/repomd.xml >/dev/null && ssh admin@servervm sudo curl -fsS http://servervm/repo/AppStream/repodata/repomd.xml >/dev/null
curl -fsS http://localhost:8181 | grep -Fq 'exam-e portal' && findmnt -no TARGET,SOURCE /mnt/harborhome | grep -Eq '^/mnt/harborhome servervm:/exports/harborhome$'

getent group harborops >/dev/null && id -nG lena | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx harborops && id -nG ivor | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx harborops && chage -l ivor | grep -Eq 'Maximum.*30' && getfacl -p /srv/harbor-drop | grep -Fq 'default:group:harborops:rwx' && getent passwd harborremote | awk -F: '{print $6":"$7}' | grep -qx ':/sbin/nologin' && grep -Eq '^minlen\s*=\s*12$' /etc/security/pwquality.conf.d/harborgrid.conf && grep -Eq '^minclass\s*=\s*3$' /etc/security/pwquality.conf.d/harborgrid.conf && atq | grep -q ivor && grep -Fqx 'echo exam-e access' /home/ivor/.bash_profile && ssh admin@servervm sudo test -d /var/log/journal

getent passwd maple551 | awk -F: '{print $3":"$6":"$7}' | grep -qx '4551::/sbin/nologin' && test -f /root/scoutte-files/opt/exam-e/find/a/file1.txt && grep -q 'beacon' /root/beacon-lines && test -f /root/var-tmp-harbor.tar.bz2 && /usr/local/bin/harbor-check >/dev/null && test -s /root/harbor-services.txt

swapon --show=NAME --noheadings | grep -qx '/dev/sdb1' && lvs --noheadings -o lv_name,vg_name,lv_size --units m --nosuffix | awk '$1=="reviewe" && $2=="reviewvge" && $3>=359 && $3<=361{f=1} END{exit !f}'
rec="$(tuned-adm recommend | awk '{print $1}')"; act="$(tuned-adm active | sed -E 's/.*: ([^ ]+).*/\1/')"; test -n "$rec" && test "$act" = "$rec"
